mnemonics: Data breaches are like a house fire, you can contain them but not extinguish the damage.
Data loss is permanent, a digital graveyard that you can't come back from.
keyPoints: Data breaches can lead to identity theft and financial loss.
Data privacy laws protect individuals' rights to control their personal data.
Access controls ensure that only authorized users can access sensitive data.
Encryption protects data by converting it into an unreadable format.
Regular backups help restore data in case of a disaster.
